description: Ana Isabel Betz (PUID: GNU777ORG), a 48-year-old female with a known history of Type 1 diabetes mellitus, has presented for her first prenatal visit. She reports a positive home pregnancy test and her last menstrual period (LMP) was exactly 70 days ago from today. This is her first pregnancy. As the attending obstetrician, complete the initial prenatal workup in GNU Health by creating a pregnancy record (Gravida 1, flagged as current pregnancy) with the calculated LMP, documenting a prenatal evaluation including blood pressure, maternal weight, and fetal heart rate, ordering a standard first-trimester prenatal laboratory panel (minimum 3 lab orders), prescribing prenatal supplementation, and scheduling her next prenatal follow-up appointment within 14-35 days from today.
